/usr/bin/c++ -O0 -ggdb -g CMakeFiles/all_backend_tests.dir/tests/test_all_backends.cpp.o CMakeFiles/all_backend_tests.dir/src/benchmark/backends/wah/wah_backend.cpp.o CMakeFiles/all_backend_tests.dir/src/benchmark/backends/croaring/croaring_backend.cpp.o CMakeFiles/all_backend_tests.dir/src/benchmark/backends/combit/combit_backend.cpp.o CMakeFiles/all_backend_tests.dir/src/benchmark/backends/ewah/ewah_backend.cpp.o CMakeFiles/all_backend_tests.dir/src/benchmark/backends/Concise/concise_backend.cpp.o CMakeFiles/all_backend_tests.dir/src/benchmark/backends/bitset/bitset_backend.cpp.o CMakeFiles/all_backend_tests.dir/src/benchmark/backends/bitset_avx512/bitset_avx512_backend.cpp.o CMakeFiles/all_backend_tests.dir/src/core/croaring/roaring.c.o CMakeFiles/all_backend_tests.dir/src/core/fastbit/bitvector.cpp.o CMakeFiles/all_backend_tests.dir/src/core/fastbit/bitvector16.cpp.o CMakeFiles/all_backend_tests.dir/src/core/fastbit/bitvector8.cpp.o CMakeFiles/all_backend_tests.dir/src/core/fastbit/fileManager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/all_backend_tests.dir/src/core/fastbit/resource.cpp.o CMakeFiles/all_backend_tests.dir/src/core/fastbit/util.cpp.o CMakeFiles/all_backend_tests.dir/src/core/fastbit/array_t.cpp.o CMakeFiles/all_backend_tests.dir/src/core/utils/util.cpp.o -o all_backend_tests  src/core/combit/libcombit.a -latomic /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libboost_program_options.so.1.74.0 lib/libgtest_main.a lib/libgtest.a
